current_rule: first nonmissing of sics1, sics2, then firm sic
how_to_read_it: Segment SIC is used first. Firm SIC is only a fallback when segment SIC is missing.

current_rule: SIC 4910-4939 or 4991; or segment name contains ELECTRIC, POWER, UTILITY
how_to_read_it: Captures electric power or utility segment exposure for coverage exploration.

current_rule: SIC 4920-4925; or segment name contains NATURAL GAS or GAS UTILITY
SIC 1311, 1380-1389, 2911, 4610-4619; or segment name contains OIL, GAS, PETROLEUM, REFIN
how_to_read_it: Captures oil, gas, petroleum, refining, and pipeline-related segment exposure.

current_rule: electric_power_output or gas_utility or oil_gas_petroleum or SIC 4900-4999
how_to_read_it: Broad energy/utility screen used to summarize overall energy exposure.
Mining plus primary metal manufacturing screen.

current_rule: SIC 4512, 4513, 4581; or segment name contains AIRLINE, AVIATION, AIR
how_to_read_it: Air transport screen used as a possible fuel-sensitive subgroup.

current_rule: SIC 2600-2699; or segment name contains PAPER or PULP
SIC 3200-3299; or segment name contains CEMENT, LIME, MINERAL, GLASS
how_to_read_it: Stone, clay, glass, cement, and minerals screen.
